data.title: Citigroup Group Ceases to Be Substantial Holder in Predictive Discovery
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Predictive Discovery Limited ( (AU:PDI) ) just unveiled an update.

Citigroup Global Markets Australia Pty Limited and its related Citi group entities have notified Predictive Discovery Limited that they have ceased to be a substantial holder as of 23 March 2026, reflecting shifts in their aggregate relevant interest below the substantial holding threshold. The change stems from a series of securities lending and ordinary-course market transactions across several Citi entities, resulting in both increases and decreases in specific holdings but an overall reduction in voting power, potentially altering the company’s institutional investor mix and liquidity dynamics.

Within the Citi group, Citibank N.A. Sydney Branch reported adjustments to its relevant interest tied to its role as agent lender and holder of securities and collateral under lending agreements. Other Citi affiliates, including Citigroup Global Markets Inc and Citigroup Global Markets Limited, also recorded offsetting changes in securities held under similar arrangements, underscoring the impact of securities lending activity on reported substantial holdings without signaling any change in corporate control or formal associations between shareholders.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:PDI) stock is a Hold with a A$0.95 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Predictive Discovery Limited stock, see the AU:PDI Stock Forecast page.

More about Predictive Discovery Limited

Predictive Discovery Limited is an Australian-listed company, with its ordinary fully paid shares traded publicly and subject to substantial shareholder reporting under the Corporations Act. The company’s register includes large institutional investors such as Citigroup Global Markets Australia Pty Limited and related Citi group entities, which actively manage positions through securities lending and market transactions.

Average Trading Volume: 16,660,460

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$1.9B

Learn more about PDI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Frontier Energy Sets 2026 AGM Date and Director Nomination Deadline
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Frontier Energy Limited ( (AU:FHE) ).

Frontier Energy Limited has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting for Wednesday, 15 May 2026, in line with ASX Listing Rule 3.13.1. The company has also set 5:00 pm AWST on Thursday, 2 April 2026 as the deadline for shareholders or other eligible parties to submit nominations for candidates seeking election to the board at the meeting.

The announcement signals the start of the company’s annual governance and board-refresh cycle, giving investors and stakeholders a clear timetable for influencing board composition. Further information about the AGM, including agenda details and any proposed resolutions, will be circulated later, providing more clarity on potential implications for Frontier Energy’s strategic direction and oversight.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:FHE) stock is a Hold with a A$0.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Frontier Energy Limited stock, see the AU:FHE Stock Forecast page.

More about Frontier Energy Limited

Frontier Energy Limited is an Australia-based energy company listed on the ASX under the ticker FHE. The company is involved in the development and operation of energy projects, with its activities governed by the ASX Listing Rules and its own corporate constitution, reflecting a standard listed-company governance framework.

Average Trading Volume: 425,614

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Morphic Ethical Equities Fund Trades at Discount to Reported NTA
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Morphic Ethical Equities Fund Ltd. ( (AU:MEC) ) is now available.

Morphic Ethical Equities Fund has reported an estimated unaudited pre-tax net tangible asset value of $1.2871 per share and a post-tax NTA of $1.2410 as at 20 March 2026. The fund’s shares closed at $1.13, indicating that the stock is trading at a discount to its underlying asset backing, a key consideration for existing and prospective investors.

The gap between NTA and market price may influence investor perceptions of value and could affect trading activity in the stock over the short term. Regular disclosure of NTA data helps maintain transparency for shareholders and provides insight into how the market is pricing the fund relative to its portfolio of ethically screened investments.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:MEC) stock is a Buy with a A$1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Morphic Ethical Equities Fund Ltd. stock, see the AU:MEC Stock Forecast page.

More about Morphic Ethical Equities Fund Ltd.

Morphic Ethical Equities Fund Ltd. is an Australian listed investment company focused on ethical and responsible equity investing. Trading on the ASX under the code MEC, it offers investors exposure to a diversified portfolio of equities screened according to environmental, social, and governance criteria.

Datadot Technology Limited ( (AU:DDT) ) just unveiled an update.

Datadot Technology Limited has applied for quotation on the ASX of 578,948 new ordinary fully paid shares, issued on March 25, 2026. The securities arise from an employee incentive scheme and will be quoted, indicating incremental equity dilution but also the use of share-based remuneration to incentivise staff and align their interests with shareholders.

The additional quoted securities modestly expand Datadot Technology’s free float and could slightly enhance liquidity in its shares on the ASX. For stakeholders, the move underscores the company’s ongoing reliance on equity incentives as part of its compensation structure, which may help with talent retention and potentially support long-term operational performance.

Regal Asian Investments Limited has disclosed a change in director Adelaide McDonald’s indirect interest in the company’s shares. Her holding, via Marraba Investments Pty Ltd as trustee for the Marraba Super Fund, increased from 48,751 to 50,056 ordinary shares following a recent transaction.

data.title: Avantel Wins Rs 459.9 Crore Satellite Communication Equipment Contract from Zetwerk
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Avantel Limited ( (IN:AVANTEL) ) has issued an announcement.

Avantel Limited has secured a domestic rate contract worth Rs 459.90 crore from Zetwerk Manufacturing Businesses Limited for the supply and long-term support of satellite communication equipment. The three-year deal covers manufacturing, a one-year comprehensive onsite warranty and a five-year annual maintenance contract, significantly strengthening Avantel’s order book and reinforcing its position in India’s satellite communications equipment market.

The contract, which is not classified as a related-party transaction, provides multi-year revenue visibility and underpins recurring service income through the AMC component. This win is expected to enhance operational scale for Avantel, deepen its relationship with a major domestic manufacturing partner and support its strategic focus on high-value communication infrastructure projects.

More about Avantel Limited

Avantel Limited is an India-based technology company specializing in the design, manufacture and maintenance of satellite communication equipment. The company operates multiple facilities in Andhra Pradesh and Telangana and serves primarily domestic clients in sectors that rely on advanced communication and connectivity solutions.

Average Trading Volume: 115,280

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

data.title: ANTA Sports Delivers Double-Digit Profit and Revenue Growth in 2025
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

ANTA Sports Products ( (HK:2020) ) has provided an update.

ANTA Sports reported audited 2025 results showing revenue rose 13.3% year on year to RMB80.2 billion, with overall operating profit margin improving 0.4 percentage points to 23.8% as it stepped up investment in branding, channels, product R&D and international expansion. Segment performance was mixed, with margin pressure at the core ANTA brand offset by an improved margin at FILA and slightly weaker profitability in other brands, while profit attributable to equity shareholders, excluding prior Amer Sports dilution gains, climbed 13.9% to RMB13.6 billion.

The group generated robust operating cash flow of RMB21.0 billion and free cash inflow of RMB16.1 billion, underscoring strong cash generation and balance sheet strength that enabled the board to propose a higher final dividend of HK108 cents per share for 2025, subject to shareholder approval. The annual results, which received an unqualified audit opinion from KPMG and were reviewed by the audit committee and board, reinforce ANTA’s positioning as a financially solid player in the sportswear sector, potentially supporting continued investment and shareholder returns amid ongoing industry competition.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2020) stock is a Hold with a HK$85.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ANTA Sports Products stock, see the HK:2020 Stock Forecast page.

More about ANTA Sports Products

ANTA Sports Products Limited is a leading Chinese sportswear company, listed in Hong Kong, that designs, manufactures and markets athletic footwear, apparel and accessories. Through its core ANTA brand, premium FILA line and a portfolio of other labels, the group targets mass‑market and higher-end consumers in China and is expanding its presence in overseas markets.

Average Trading Volume: 10,080,441

Technical Sentiment Signal: Hold

Current Market Cap: HK$209.4B

data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

ABx Group Limited ( (AU:ABX) ) has shared an update.

ABx Group has issued an amended version of its rare earths presentation prepared for the PDAC Convention in Toronto, updating key disclosure elements for investors. The revisions clarify data sourcing and peer comparison methods used in the presentation, potentially enhancing transparency and credibility around the company’s rare earth product composition and pricing assumptions.

The updated document now includes explicit references on slides outlining Mixed Rare Earth Carbonate composition and Rare Earth Oxide pricing to appendix data sources, which detail underlying datasets, peer selection methodology, and development stages. This refinement may help stakeholders better assess ABx’s competitive positioning in rare earth markets and evaluate the robustness of its technical and commercial assumptions.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:ABX) stock is a Hold with a A$0.08 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ABx Group Limited stock, see the AU:ABX Stock Forecast page.

More about ABx Group Limited

ABx Group Limited is an Australian company listed on the ASX that is focused on supplying light and heavy rare earths from projects in Tasmania. The company aims to feed Western supply chains with these critical minerals, positioning itself within the strategic rare earths sector supporting advanced manufacturing and clean energy technologies.

data.title: Total Metals Closes Menary Gold Project Acquisition in Key Ontario Mining District
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Total Metals ( (TSE:TT) ) has issued an announcement.

Total Metals Corp. has closed the acquisition of the Menary Gold Project in Ontario’s Kenora Mining Division, a 276.5-hectare package of 27 mining claims and one mining lease bordering the Rainy River land package recently tied to Coeur Mining’s multibillion-dollar takeover of New Gold. The property hosts multiple high-grade zones, including bonanza-grade grab samples, strong channel sampling results and a newly identified mineralized zone at depth, reinforcing the district’s status as a premier North American gold jurisdiction.

Under an option agreement, Total Metals can earn a 100% interest in Menary by paying $1,010,000 in cash and issuing an equal value in shares over four years, subject to a 4.5% net smelter royalty held by Western Troy Capital Corp. and William McNerney. The first tranche of consideration, totaling $210,000 in cash and 507,678 shares priced at $0.41365, has been completed on an arm’s length basis, signaling a meaningful expansion of Total Metals’ gold-focused portfolio in a highly active mining camp.

More about Total Metals

Total Metals Corp. is a Canadian exploration company focused on its 100% owned Electrolode Project in northwestern Ontario, targeting critical minerals and gold across three favorable geological trends near major Red Lake-area operations. The company also owns the High Lake and West Hawk Lake gold properties along the Manitoba–Ontario border, with the Purex Zone at High Lake prioritized for initial exploration and potential future mining.

Average Trading Volume: 232,970

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$17.08M
